title: Suggested Learning Resources for Cloud Security
description: A flowchart showing the progression of learning resources for Module 5: Cloud Computing & Security, guiding students from foundational to advanced topics.
elements: Official Cloud Provider Docs (AWS, Azure, GCP)
Hands-on Lab Platforms (Qwiklabs, A Cloud Guru)
relationships: Start with Official Docs for fundamentals
Use NIST & OWASP for security principles
Apply CIS Benchmarks for configuration guidance
Consult Academic Papers for in-depth theory
Utilize Lab Platforms for practical experience
